temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on the face of an East Asian man at night. He has a serious and intense expression, with sweat glistening on his skin. He is wearing a dark, possibly black, collared shirt. In the dimly lit background, out-of-focus lights create a soft bokeh effect. In the top left corner of the screen, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera remains steady, capturing the man's determined look. A man shouts with a loud, aggressive, and commanding voice, his tone filled with intense urgency and a sense of finality. He yells, "阿强，是陈哥！大声的再说一次，可卡因是你的！" (Ah Qiang, it's Brother Chen! Say it out loud again, the cocaine is yours!). The background is dark and quiet, with no discernible music or other sound effects, making his powerful and demanding voice the central focus. The scene cuts to a wide shot, revealing the man from the previous shot sitting in a small, dark boat. He is now seen from a distance, silhouetted against the darkness. Another person is seated beside him in the boat. The boat is positioned in what appears to be a dark body of water, with only a few distant lights visible on the horizon. The white Chinese text remains in the top left corner.
